headline: CVS Health appoints former Elevance Health CFO John E. Gallina to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee.
investor_impact: The addition of John E. Gallina brings deep managed care and financial expertise to the Board, given his nearly 30-year tenure at Elevance Health. This strengthens CVS's audit committee and provides valuable strategic oversight for its Aetna health benefits business.
key_figures: June 2016 to November 1, 2023 (Tenure as Elevance CFO)
